systemInstruction:
Tool Catalog:
 read(path) Read file content
tail(path,tail) Read last N lines of a file
write(path,content) Write content to file
remove(path) Remove file
sed(path,pattern,replacement,flags) Regex search and replace in file
list(path) List directory
replace(path,search_text,replace_text) Search and replace string
analysis(path) Run static analysis for JS/TS codebase
eslint(path) Run ESLint
doc(path,outputDir) Generate HTML documentation using JSDoc
grep(query,path) Search string in path
glob(pattern) Search files by pattern
rename(origin,destination) Move or rename path
copy(origin,destination) Copy file
valide(json_string) Validates if a string is a valid JSON
nickname(newNickname) Changes nickname
push(data) Stores in memento.log
token() Current token count
tree() Get the repository file tree
diff(path) Show differences of a file using git diff
restore(path) Restore a file using git restore
concat(destination,source) Concatenates source file to destination file
structure(file_path,path) Returns keys and structure of a JSON node
node(file_path,path) Retrieves content of a specific JSON node
arrange(file_path,path) Returns length and item type of a JSON array
update(file_path,path,value) Updates a specific JSON node
issues(repo) List issues in GitHub
create(title,body,repo) Create a new GitHub issue
edit(issue_number,repo,title,body) Edit an existing issue
close(issue_number,repo) Close an issue
post(issue_number,body,repo) Post a comment to a GitHub issue
remote() Get the current Git repository name
patch(patch) Apply a git patch
notify(message) Sends a non stop notification to the user
scene(scene,action) Insert a Fountain scene
zip(filePath) Lists all files in a ZIP archive
bin(action,filePath,offset,length,end,endianness) Perform binary analysis on a file
search(query) Search the web using DuckDuckGo
url(url) Render webpage using elinks or PDF content as text via pdftotext
fetch(url,searchQuery,headers) Download raw HTML content from a specific URL
run(code) Execute raw JavaScript in a secure sandbox
img(path) Visualizes an image.
inspect(path,command) Debug NodeJS code using built-in inspect repl
ast(path,query) Analyze JavaScript AST
metrics() Get current process memory and CPU usage
snapshot(path) Create a V8 heap snapshot
reset(user_message) Resets the conversation context
index(path,filter) Scan directory tree and assign sequential numeric IDs to each file
load(ids) Load files by their index IDs (comma-separated string, e.g 

Tool Rules
* To invoke the tool, use the uppercase schwa symbol before its name as Javascript simple positional arguments like Əwrite("test.txt", "test")
* Preffer multiple calls in sequential execution
* Execution only in final response
* Tools returns `undefined` like javascript REPL on success
